# FlipMyCase — Free Online Text Tools

> https://flipmycase.com

FlipMyCase is a suite of free, browser-based text tools for developers and writers. All processing happens client-side — no text is sent to any server. No signup required, no limits.

## Tools

### Text Case & Formatting
- [Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com): Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, dot.case, alternating case, inverse case, and URL slugs.
- [Text Cleaner](https://flipmycase.com/text-cleaner): Remove extra spaces, line breaks, tabs, smart quotes, non-breaking spaces, and zero-width characters from messy text.
- [Toggle Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/toggle-case-converter): Convert text to alternating caps (tOgGlE cAsE) for mocking memes and alternating uppercase/lowercase.
- [SpongeBob Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/spongebob-case-converter): Convert text to sPoNgEbOb mocking case for memes and social media.
- [Snake vs Kebab Converter](https://flipmycase.com/snake-kebab-converter): Convert between snake_case and kebab-case with side-by-side comparison.
- [Text Sorter](https://flipmycase.com/text-sorter): Sort text lines alphabetically, numerically, by length, or shuffle randomly.
- [Text Reverser](https://flipmycase.com/text-reverser): Reverse text by characters, words, lines, or mirror text.
- [Duplicate Line Remover](https://flipmycase.com/duplicate-line-remover): Remove duplicate lines from lists with case-insensitive matching and sorting.
- [Text Repeater](https://flipmycase.com/text-repeater): Repeat any text up to 1000 times with custom separators.
- [Plain Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/plain-text-converter): Strip formatting, remove HTML tags, convert smart quotes and dashes to plain text.
- [Add Line Numbers](https://flipmycase.com/add-line-numbers): Add or remove line numbers from text with custom start numbers and separators.
- [Find & Replace](https://flipmycase.com/find-and-replace): Find and replace text with regex support, case matching, and whole word options.
- [Add Prefix/Suffix](https://flipmycase.com/add-prefix-suffix): Add prefix or suffix to every line of text.
- [Remove Line Breaks](https://flipmycase.com/remove-line-breaks): Remove line breaks and join lines with spaces, commas, or custom separators.
- [Remove Empty Lines](https://flipmycase.com/remove-empty-lines): Remove blank and empty lines from text.
- [Extract Emails](https://flipmycase.com/extract-emails): Extract all email addresses from any text block.
- [Extract URLs](https://flipmycase.com/extract-urls): Extract all URLs from any text block with deduplication and domain breakdown.
- [Remove HTML Tags](https://flipmycase.com/remove-html-tags): Strip HTML and XML tags from text, keep specific tags, decode entities.
- [Text to List](https://flipmycase.com/text-to-list): Convert paragraphs to bullet points, numbered lists, HTML or Markdown lists.
- [List to Text](https://flipmycase.com/list-to-text): Convert bulleted or numbered lists to flowing text.
- [Smart Quotes Converter](https://flipmycase.com/smart-quotes-converter): Convert curly quotes to straight or straight to typographic quotes.

### Font Styles
- [Bold Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bold-text-generator): Generate bold Unicode text you can copy and paste anywhere.
- [Italic Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/italic-text-generator): Generate italic Unicode text you can copy and paste anywhere.
- [Bold Italic Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bold-italic-text-generator): Generate bold italic Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Strikethrough Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/strikethrough-text-generator): Generate strikethrough Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Underline Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/underline-text-generator): Generate underlined Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Superscript Generator](https://flipmycase.com/superscript-generator): Generate superscript Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Subscript Generator](https://flipmycase.com/subscript-generator): Generate subscript Unicode text with numbers and available letters.
- [Small Caps Generator](https://flipmycase.com/small-caps-generator): Generate small caps Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Upside Down Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/upside-down-text-generator): Generate upside down text you can copy and paste.
- [Fancy Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/fancy-text-generator): Generate 12+ Unicode text styles including bold, italic, bubble, upside down, and more.
- [Bubble Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bubble-text-generator): Generate bubble/circled Unicode text you can copy and paste.
- [Wide Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/wide-text-generator): Generate fullwidth vaporwave text you can copy and paste.

### Developer & Code Tools
- [JSON Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/json-formatter): Format, validate, beautify, and minify JSON with tree view and error detection.
- [Regex Tester](https://flipmycase.com/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with real-time highlighting, capture groups, and replace mode.
- [Hash Generator](https://flipmycase.com/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes from text or files.
- [Slug Generator](https://flipmycase.com/slug-generator): Convert any title into a clean, SEO-friendly URL slug.
- [YAML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/yaml-formatter): Format, validate, and convert YAML with JSON bidirectional conversion.
- [XML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/xml-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify XML with error detection.
- [CSV to JSON](https://flipmycase.com/csv-to-json): Convert CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV with auto-detect delimiters.
- [Markdown Preview](https://flipmycase.com/markdown-preview): Write Markdown and see a live rendered preview with HTML export.
- [SQL Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/sql-formatter): Format SQL with uppercase keywords, proper indentation, and minification.
- [HTML to Markdown](https://flipmycase.com/html-to-markdown): Convert HTML to Markdown and Markdown to HTML bidirectionally.
- [Cron Expression Builder](https://flipmycase.com/cron-expression-builder): Build cron expressions visually with presets and next execution times.
- [JWT Decoder](https://flipmycase.com/jwt-decoder): Decode JWT tokens to see header and payload with expiration status.
- [CSS Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/css-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify CSS with indent and comment options.
- [HTML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/html-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify HTML with customizable indentation.
- [JavaScript Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/javascript-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify JavaScript with indent options.

### Analysis & Counting
- [Word Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time with keyword density.
- [Text Diff](https://flipmycase.com/text-diff): Compare two texts side by side with highlighted additions and deletions.
- [Word Frequency Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-frequency-counter): Count word frequency, analyze bigrams and trigrams, generate word clouds.
- [AI Writing Analyzer](https://flipmycase.com/ai-writing-analyzer): Analyze statistical writing patterns including sentence uniformity and vocabulary diversity.
- [Readability Analyzer](https://flipmycase.com/readability-analyzer): Check readability with Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, SMOG, and more.
- [Text Statistics](https://flipmycase.com/text-statistics): Analyze text with word frequency, vocabulary richness, lexical density, and more.
- [Line Counter](https://flipmycase.com/line-counter): Count total lines, empty lines, and non-empty lines with length stats.

### Encoding & Conversion
- [String Encoder](https://flipmycase.com/string-encoder): Encode and decode Base64, URL, HTML entities, hex, and binary strings.
- [Number Base Converter](https://flipmycase.com/number-base-converter): Convert between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal.
- [Color Code Converter](https://flipmycase.com/color-code-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK color codes with WCAG contrast checker.
- [Morse Code Translator](https://flipmycase.com/morse-code-translator): Translate text to Morse code and back with audio playback.
- [ROT13 Cipher](https://flipmycase.com/rot13-encoder-decoder): Encode and decode ROT13, ROT5, ROT47, and custom Caesar ciphers.
- [Binary Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/binary-text-converter): Convert text to binary and binary to text with per-character breakdown.
- [Hex Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/hex-text-converter): Convert text to hexadecimal and hex to text with per-character breakdown.
- [NATO Phonetic Alphabet](https://flipmycase.com/nato-phonetic-alphabet): Convert text to NATO phonetic alphabet with full reference table.
- [Pig Latin Converter](https://flipmycase.com/pig-latin-converter): Convert English to Pig Latin and back, preserving punctuation.

### Generators
- [Password Generator](https://flipmycase.com/password-generator): Generate strong random passwords with custom length and character sets.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://flipmycase.com/lorem-ipsum-generator): Generate placeholder text in 5 styles including Lorem Ipsum, Hipster, and Pirate.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://flipmycase.com/unix-timestamp-converter): Convert Unix timestamps to human dates and dates to timestamps.
- [UUID Generator](https://flipmycase.com/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers with bulk mode.
- [Random Number Generator](https://flipmycase.com/random-number-generator): Generate random numbers with custom ranges, bulk mode, and dice roller.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://flipmycase.com/roman-numeral-converter): Convert numbers to Roman numerals and back with date mode.
- [QR Code Generator](https://flipmycase.com/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes for URLs, text, email, phone, and WiFi.
- [Emoji Picker](https://flipmycase.com/emoji-picker): Search and copy emojis by name or category with code points.
- [Unicode Lookup](https://flipmycase.com/unicode-lookup): Search and copy Unicode characters by name or category.

### Guides
- [Underscore Guide](https://flipmycase.com/underscore-conventions): Guide to underscore conventions in programming — _private, __dunder, snake_case.
- [All Caps Guide](https://flipmycase.com/all-caps-guide): When ALL CAPS is rude vs necessary in emails, social media, and code.

## Comparison Guides
- [camelCase vs snake_case vs kebab-case](https://flipmycase.com/camelcase-vs-snake-case): When to use each naming convention in programming, with language-specific examples and a comparison table.
- [Text Tools for Developers](https://flipmycase.com/text-tools-for-developers): Directory of 20+ free browser-based developer tools — JSON formatter, regex tester, hash generator, UUID, JWT decoder, and more.
- [JSON vs YAML vs XML](https://flipmycase.com/json-vs-yaml-vs-xml): Syntax differences, use cases, and performance comparison to help you choose the right data format.
